title: Happy Ghast
body:
This datapack is a backport of the Happy Ghast from the MC Live preview. It's a near 1:1 screengrab recreation from the MC Live event with minor changes from community votes.

To ensure this Datapack works, download both the Data and Resource files now listed separately in the Versions tab.

## The Happy Ghast
### Dried Ghast -
Crafted from Bone Blocks and Ghast Tears, or found occasionally in the Soul Sand Valley's of the Nether around fossil structures. You can place these new custom blocks in Water to rehydrate them over the period of 30 real world minutes. As they rehydrate they will expand and change texture, getting happier over time. Once rehydrated, the block will disappear and become a Ghastling.

### Ghastling -
Ghastlings will follow the player that placed their initial Dried Ghast block in water, though sometimes will stop to wander about curiously. After another 30 real world minutes they will grow into Happy Ghasts. This process can be sped up by feeding them Snowballs.

### Happy Ghast -
When a Ghastling matures, it becomes a Happy Ghast. Happy Ghasts will no longer follow any specific player, but can wear Harnesses that allow players to mount and ride them. When Harnessed you can also stand atop them, allowing you to fight/create/have fun in the skies!

## Crafting Recipes

### Dried Ghast Block
The recipe requires 5 Bone Blocks and 4 Ghast Tears.

### Harness
Harnesses can be crafted with any colour of wool, changing the colour of the fabric your Happy Ghast Wears. The Recipe also requires 3 Leather and 2 Glass.

## Known Issues & Troubleshooting
- The Happy Ghast and Ghastlings are both immune to damage from the player. This is an intentional addition.
- If you experience any bugs or issues, please reach out with a description of the problem to the discord.

## FAQ's
There aren't any FAQs yet. Any questions from other pages will be shared in here.
